summary: The diff addresses all three requirements. REQ-1 is fixed in QuotationRequestPage.tsx with a handleDesignStatusChange handler and state management. REQ-2 is fixed via consistent session storage keys in AdminLoginPage.tsx and synchronous session checking in AdminGuard.tsx. REQ-3 is addressed in Layout.tsx by adding an 'Admin' link with a lock icon in the footer navigating to /admin/login. All three requirements appear to be implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: Biometric login support (useBiometricLogin hook and handleBiometricLogin handler) added to AdminLoginPage
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requested fixing email/password admin login and did not request adding biometric authentication as a login method.
